overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious futuristic apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring minimalist modern furniture, a distinctive slatted wooden ceiling, and panoramic floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a dense futuristic cityscape. The camera smoothly moves from the bedroom area past a holographic aquarium display, showcasing dramatic interplay between natural window light and moody neon interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment bedroom with platform bed

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the apartment bedroom area toward the large windows, observing the modern interior design

entered.detail: dramatic wooden slat ceiling with warm lighting creating striped shadow patterns
low modern platform bed with dark bedding on raised wooden platform
large wall-mounted holographic display showing glowing blue aquatic sphere with fish
deep red carpet covering the floor of the living space

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a moody, luxurious bedroom with a low platform bed to the left and a striking slatted wooden ceiling overhead. The camera moves forward across the red carpet toward a distant holographic display glowing blue on the far wall, with large windows beginning to come into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic window gallery with city views

events.description: moving into brighter zone near floor-to-ceiling windows with strong natural light flooding the space

agents.ego_description: walking along the window wall while looking out at the futuristic cityscape visible through the glass

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass windows with horizontal blinds offering panoramic city views
tall rectangular white floor lamp with warm glow positioned near the window
dense futuristic city skyline with numerous high-rise buildings and towers visible through the glass

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a bright gallery space defined by massive floor-to-ceiling windows that reveal a sprawling futuristic metropolis outside. Natural light floods the interior, illuminating modern floor lamps while the holographic display remains visible in the background. The cityscape dominates the view with its dense cluster of high-rise towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner of apartment with extended city views

events.description: flying vehicle passes by outside the window in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the window wall, briefly observing flying traffic outside before beginning to turn back toward the interior

entered.detail: small dark flying vehicle visible briefly through the window against the sky

segments.scene_description: Moving along the corner of the apartment, the camera continues to show the expansive city views through the windows. A flying vehicle briefly appears in the sky outside around the 38-second mark. The floor lamps shift position relative to the camera as it progresses along the window wall, and the view of the cityscape pans to show different angles of the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: living area with holographic display and seating

events.description: turning away from the windows to face the interior living space with holographic display

agents.ego_description: turning toward the central living area and approaching the holographic aquarium display between the sofas

entered.detail: modern white minimalist sofa with clean lines positioned facing the holographic display
low rectangular coffee table situated between the two white sofas

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the windows to reveal the main living area, where a large holographic aquarium display glows blue between two white minimalist sofas. The space is defined by the red carpet and moody neon lighting from the hologram, creating an intimate, futuristic atmosphere distinct from the bright exterior views.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, intimate bedroom into a bright, expansive gallery before settling in a neon-lit living area. It begins by gliding across a red carpet beneath a slatted wooden ceiling, moving away from a low platform bed toward a distant blue holographic glow. As the camera enters the gallery space, the interior opens up into a flood of natural light from massive floor-to-ceiling windows that reveal a sprawling futuristic metropolis of high-rise towers. The view continues to pan across the urban landscape, catching a flying vehicle in the sky, before the camera turns away from the bright exterior. Finally, the scene shifts back to a moody atmosphere as the camera reveals the main living area, where a large holographic aquarium glows blue between two minimalist white sofas.
